title: Location-Area Validation, Encounter Relations, Filters, and Provenance
description: The explore command confuses location endpoints, casts nested encounter arrays, filters before validation, collapses duplicate relationships, and produces an unbounded result list. Learners cumulatively produce validated provenance-rich encounter explorer through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Distinguish region, location, and location-area endpoints and choose the relation that answers the stakeholder question.
Validate area identity and every nested Pokemon, version detail, method, condition, chance, and level shape needed by the view.
Deduplicate only chosen display rows while retaining source area, version, method, chance, conditions, and original identity.
